question: What were the eight tallest towers of the architect that designed the tallest building in the year 2000
reference_answer: ['Burj Khalifa', 'Sears Tower (renamed Willis Tower), Wacker Drive, Chicago, USA', 'Willis Tower', 'Sears Tower, renamed Willis Tower, Chicago, 1970–1973', 'One World Trade Center', 'Jin Mao Tower', 'Nanjing Greenland Financial Center', 'Al Hamra Tower']
